name: Marketplace Package Detail
description: Detail view for a single marketplace package (/marketplace/[slug]). With the routeStub returning a valid package, the populated PackageHeader renders 'Back' and 'Install Package' buttons — these are static-text elements exclusive to the success branch (the not-found branch renders 'Back to Marketplace' instead). button-install-package is the clean load-bearing success marker. Ports marketplace.spec.ts package detail rendering. Read-only; structural only.

body.name: Spec CI Package
body.description: A sentinel package for spec CI verification.
body.author: spec-ci

states.name: Populated package header
states.description: The PackageHeader rendered when package data is present. The 'Install Package' button is the clean load-bearing success marker — it renders ONLY in the populated branch (the not-found branch shows 'Back to Marketplace' instead).

assertions.description: Install Package button — populated-only, load-bearing success marker.
Back button in the populated PackageHeader.
